---
title: "Remarkably Bright Creatures by Shelby Van Pelt - Review"
---

Such a beautiful book! Octopi are my favorite animals, so I loved how one of the main characters was an octopus. Such a sweet story of friendship and how smart octopi can be. This is on my list of top 3 books I have ever read, and recommed that you just read it. 

PS. Netflix is adapting this book into a tv show. I'm concerned how they will be able to show the beauty and emotion, but I'm looking forward to seeing.
